mapper.select: select process_key_id, process_id, product_id, process_name, unit_price, cost_time, process_id as processOldId, product_id as productOldId from process where process_key_id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} and delete_flg = false
mapper.update:
update process
process_name = #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
process_id = #{processId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
unit_price = #{unitPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
cost_time = #{costTime,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
update_date_time = current_timestamp
where process_key_id = #{processKeyId, jdbcType=BIGINT} and delete_flg = false
mapper.select: select product_id, product_style_name, product_name from product where delete_flg = false order by product_style_name,product_name
mapper.update:
update process
delete_flg = true, update_date_time = current_timestamp
where process_key_id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and delete_flg = false
mapper.insert: insert into process ( process_id, product_id, process_name, unit_price, cost_time, create_date_time, update_date_time ) values ( #{processId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{costTime,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
